title: Semester-End Examination Process for Data Security & Privacy
description: A flowchart illustrating the secure and privacy-preserving lifecycle of administering and grading a final exam, from creation to result delivery, with embedded security controls.
relationships: Creator encrypts and uploads exam to Platform
Platform authenticates Student and grants access
Student downloads and completes exam, then submits back to Platform
Platform performs Automated Checks on submission
Approved submission is sent to Grader via anonymized interface
Graded result is stored in Encrypted Database
Result is released to Student and archived in Academic Records System
